title: I Left My Heart in San Francisco
album: I Left My Heart In San Francisco
why_this_song: I Left My Heart in San Francisco by Tony Bennett (1962) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Your golden sun will shine for me
When I come home to you, San Francisco
Your golden sun will shine for me
The loveliness of Paris seems somehow sadly gay
The glory that was Rome is of another day
I've been terribly alone and forgotten in Manhattan
I'm going home to my city by the Bay

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "francisco" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "francisco" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "home" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "home" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The loveliness of Paris seems somehow sadly gay
High on a hill, it calls to me
When I come home to you, San Francisco

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "I Left My Heart in San Francisco" was released in 1962. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "I Left My Heart in San Francisco" foi lançada em 1962. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "I Left My Heart in San Francisco" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "I Left My Heart in San Francisco" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
